assertions.title: Shared Distribute Shares renders content parity

steps.expected: Shared Distribute screen renders with stepper state, subtitle, 3 share cards, and Continue CTA
steps.observed: Rendered top bar, stepper (1+2 complete, 3 active), subtitle copy, Share 1 saved pill, Share 2 not distributed with masked password/copy/QR, Share 3 locked placeholder and disabled copy/QR, and Continue to Completion CTA

evidence.network: Client-side SPA surface; no API calls relevant to this assertion observed.

assertions.title: Shared Distribute Shares stepper highlights step 3

steps.expected: Step 3 Distribute Shares active (blue ring/numeral/label) while steps 1 and 2 are green complete
steps.observed: Stepper shows step 1 and step 2 completed with green checks and step 3 highlighted as active

assertions.title: Shared Distribute Shares locked share gate

steps.action: Inspect Share 3 and Share 2 rows on /demo/shared-distribute-shares
steps.expected: Share 3 shows dashed placeholder and Copy/QR disabled at 0.4 opacity; Share 2 shows masked password and enabled Copy/QR
steps.observed: Share 3 shows dashed 'Enter password to unlock' and disabled Copy/QR; Share 2 shows masked password and enabled Copy/QR. Computed opacity for disabled Copy/QR measured 0.45, not 0.4.

assertions.issues: Disabled Copy/QR controls on Share 3 are dimmed but computed opacity is 0.45 rather than the assertion's specified 0.4.

assertions.title: Shared Distribute Shares Continue advances to Completion

evidence.network: Route transition handled in SPA; no failing requests observed.

steps.expected: Render distribution completion copy, status rows/chips, success panel, and Finish Distribution CTA
steps.observed: Rendered title/subtitle, distribution status rows for Member #1 and Member #2 with chips (Copied/QR shown), success panel 'All packages distributed', and Finish Distribution CTA

evidence.network: SPA asset/document GETs only; no failing requests observed.

assertions.title: Distribution Completion exits shared flow to dashboard

steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/ (welcome), not a /dashboard/{profileId} route

evidence.network: SPA route transition; no error requests observed.

assertions.issues: Finish Distribution does not land on /dashboard/{profileId}; it returns to welcome '/'.

assertions.title: Confirm Password gate on Continue CTA

steps.expected: With matching preset passwords, Continue to Distribute Shares is enabled
steps.observed: CTA is enabled in preset state

steps.expected: Continue CTA becomes disabled (visual disabled state)
steps.observed: CTA becomes disabled when Confirm Password is cleared
CTA remains disabled with mismatched confirm password

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 5 passed, 2 failed, 0 blocked (fails: VAL-SHR-008, VAL-SHR-011).
